title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
